CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.OBS_Last_Email__c)), ISBLANK(Account__r.OBC_Last_Email__c) ), Account__r.OBS_Last_Email__c, IF( AND( ISBLANK(Account__r.OBS_Last_Email__c), NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.OBC_Last_Email__c)) ), Account__r.OBC_Last_Email__c, IF( Account__r.OBS_Last_Email__c > Account__r.OBC_Last_Email__c, Account__r.OBS_Last_Email__c, Account__r.OBC_Last_Email__c ) ) )
CustomField.label: Last Onboarding Email
